overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a video game depicting a gothic great hall with students in dark robes seated at long wooden tables. The scene features ornate stone architecture, tall arched windows, and dim atmospheric lighting. A single student briefly enters from the left and walks toward the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with dining tables

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the great hall interior from a fixed position

notable_agents.action: student walking from left side toward the foreground past the dining tables

entered.detail: tall arched windows with stone tracery allowing diffused light into the hall
large carved wooden door with stone architrave at the far end of the hall
elaborate iron light fixtures hanging from the high ceiling
dark wooden dining tables arranged in rows with students seated on benches
massive stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling structure

segments.scene_description: A static view of a gothic great hall interior with students in dark robes seated at long wooden tables. The architecture features tall arched windows, stone pillars, and an ornate doorway at the far end. Midway through the clip, a student enters from the left foreground and walks toward the camera while other students remain seated at their tables.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view of a gothic great hall that shifts from a still tableau of seated students to a scene of subtle movement. It begins with a wide perspective of the interior, where students in dark robes sit silently at long wooden tables beneath tall arched windows and stone pillars. As the camera holds its position, the stillness is broken when a single student enters from the left foreground. The scene then focuses on this figure as they walk steadily toward the camera, while the ornate doorway and the remaining seated students linger in the dim, cinematic background.
